mapper.select:
SELECT su.id, username, su.name, type, phone, avatar_url, additional_info, post_id, su.status, sp.name post_name FROM system_user su LEFT JOIN system_post sp ON su.post_id = sp.id AND sp.is_deleted = 0
su.is_deleted = 0
AND su.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryVo.name}, '%')
AND su.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryVo.phone}, '%')
SELECT id, username, password, name, type, phone, avatar_url, additional_info, post_id, status FROM system_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND username = #{username}
